'''dhotayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:loadless|loadless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loadless|loadless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhotayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotayithi|dhotayithi]] || [[word:dhotayiji|dhotayiji]] || [[word:dhotayishi|dhotayishi]] || [[word:dhotayiki|dhotayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotayuthuthu|dhotayuthuthu]] || [[word:dhotayujuju|dhotayujuju]] || [[word:dhotayushushu|dhotayushushu]] || [[word:dhotayukuku|dhotayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotayuthu|dhotayuthu]] || [[word:dhotayuju|dhotayuju]] || [[word:dhotayushu|dhotayushu]] || [[word:dhotayuku|dhotayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotayufthuf|dhotayufthuf]] || [[word:dhotayufjuf|dhotayufjuf]] || [[word:dhotayufshuf|dhotayufshuf]] || [[word:dhotayufkuf|dhotayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotayethe|dhotayethe]] || [[word:dhotayeje|dhotayeje]] || [[word:dhotayeshe|dhotayeshe]] || [[word:dhotayeke|dhotayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotayothotho|dhotayothotho]] || [[word:dhotayojojo|dhotayojojo]] || [[word:dhotayoshosho|dhotayoshosho]] || [[word:dhotayokoko|dhotayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotayotho|dhotayotho]] || [[word:dhotayojo|dhotayojo]] || [[word:dhotayosho|dhotayosho]] || [[word:dhotayoko|dhotayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotayofthof|dhotayofthof]] || [[word:dhotayofjof|dhotayofjof]] || [[word:dhotayofshof|dhotayofshof]] || [[word:dhotayofkof|dhotayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotayïfthïf|dhotayïfthïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfjïf|dhotayïfjïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfshïf|dhotayïfshïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfkïf|dhotayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotayïfthïfthïf|dhotayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfjïfjïf|dhotayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfshïfshïf|dhotayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfkïfkïf|dhotayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotayïfthïf|dhotayïfthïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfjïf|dhotayïfjïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfshïf|dhotayïfshïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfkïf|dhotayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotayïfthïf|dhotayïfthïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfjïf|dhotayïfjïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfshïf|dhotayïfshïf]] || [[word:dhotayïfkïf|dhotayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhotayæthæ|dhotayæthæ]] || [[word:dhotayæjæ|dhotayæjæ]] || [[word:dhotayæshæ|dhotayæshæ]] || [[word:dhotayækæ|dhotayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhotayathatha|dhotayathatha]] || [[word:dhotayajaja|dhotayajaja]] || [[word:dhotayashasha|dhotayashasha]] || [[word:dhotayakaka|dhotayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhotayatha|dhotayatha]] || [[word:dhotayaja|dhotayaja]] || [[word:dhotayasha|dhotayasha]] || [[word:dhotayaka|dhotayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhotayafthaf|dhotayafthaf]] || [[word:dhotayafjaf|dhotayafjaf]] || [[word:dhotayafshaf|dhotayafshaf]] || [[word:dhotayafkaf|dhotayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhotayasha|dhotayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhotayshësha|dhotayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhotayrosha|dhotayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhotaymusha|dhotaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhotayasha|dhotayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhotaynkshësha|godhotaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhotaynkrosha|godhotaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhotaynkmusha|godhotaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhotaynkyasha|godhotaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhotatayasha|dhotatayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhotatayshësha|dhotatayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhotatayrosha|dhotatayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhotataymusha|dhotataymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhotatayasha|dhotatayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhotataynkshësha|godhotataynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhotataynkrosha|godhotataynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhotataynkmusha|godhotataynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhotataynkyasha|godhotataynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhetæyasha|dhetæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhetæyshësha|dhetæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhetæyrosha|dhetæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhetæymusha|dhetæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhetæyasha|dhetæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhetæynkshësha|godhetæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhetæynkrosha|godhetæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhetæynkmusha|godhetæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhetæynkyasha|godhetæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhotfayasha|dhotfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhotfayshësha|dhotfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhotfayrosha|dhotfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhotfaymusha|dhotfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhotfayasha|dhotfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhotfaynkshësha|godhotfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhotfaynkrosha|godhotfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhotfaynkmusha|godhotfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhotfaynkyasha|godhotfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
